title: IGNORE v1
description: Single source of truth for file exclusion rules across all tools.

ruleSets.description: Named, reusable pattern collections. Keys are referenced via @name.

generate.description: Output filename → pattern list. The CLI writes each key as a file next to IGNORE.

ignore.description: Tool/plugin identifier → pattern list. Consumed natively by plugins; no file is written.

items.description: A gitignore-syntax pattern, or @ruleSetName to inline a named ruleSet.
